fact.fact: Daemon refreshes device/runtime liveness every 5 seconds and carries daemon process facts in the same snapshot; control-plane projects device/runtime read models offline after 20 seconds without a refreshed runtime snapshot
fact.human_doc_phrase: Device/runtime liveness snapshot and stale projection

source_refs.required_phrase: stale runtimes must not be used for newly derived `AgentRuntimeBinding`

downstreams.local_scope: projects daemon process facts, stale device daemons/runtimes as offline/missing in client reads, and excludes stale runtimes from newly derived daemon agent bindings
sends daemon process facts inside the aggregated daemon runtime snapshot on the 5 second heartbeat cadence even when no assignment is active
no generated route or response-shape change; existing runtime availability, detection, and daemon-detail fields drive UI state
